pi_items.source: Task description explicitly provides this customer name, and scripts/setup_data.sh provisions 'Ernst Handel' in the Northwind Traders business.
Task description requires entering exactly $120.00. Confirmed expected value in export_result.sh which scrapes for '120.00'.
Task description requires the date to be 2025-08-15. Confirmed expected format and value in export_result.sh.
Task description states the payee is 'Port Authority'. export_result.sh checks for this exact string in the payment record.
Task description requires the account to be 'Billable Expenses'. This is a standard built-in Manager.io module to be enabled during the task.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires data entry for a synthetic business scenario in Manager.io. The agent is explicitly instructed to create a payment of $120.00 to 'Port Authority' on '2025-08-15' under the 'Billable Expenses' account, linked to the customer 'Ernst Handel'. The customer 'Ernst Handel' is a predefined synthetic record populated by the setup script (scripts/setup_data.sh). All metadata constraints exactly match the explicit instructions given to the agent in the task description and are checked by the grading scripts.
